segments.text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. How can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Hi, Michael! My name is Alex Murphy. I'm interested in transmission services for my car.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Great to hear from you, Alex! We do offer transmission repair services. Can you tell me a bit more about your vehicle?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sure, I have a 2015 Honda Accord. It's been having trouble shifting gears lately.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: I see. That can definitely be frustrating. Have you noticed any warning lights on the dashboard?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, the check engine light has been on for a while now.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: That’s often a sign that a diagnostic is needed. We offer a full vehicle diagnostic for $100.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Okay, that sounds reasonable. How long does that usually take?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: It typically takes about an hour. After that, we can provide you with a detailed report.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Perfect. What are your hours?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: We’re open Monday to Friday from 8 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 9 AM to 4 PM.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Got it. I can probably drop it off this Saturday.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: That works for us! Would you like me to schedule that appointment for you?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, please. What time is available?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: We can do 9 AM or 10 AM. Which one would you prefer?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Let’s go with 10 AM.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Great! I’ll put you down for a diagnostic on Saturday at 10 AM.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Thank you! Also, how long do transmission repairs usually take?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: It really depends on the issue, but repairs can range from 2 to 5 hours.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: And pricing?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Transmission repairs can range from $500 to $2,500, depending on the repairs needed.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I see. That’s a wide range. Will you provide an estimate after the diagnostic?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Absolutely! Once we complete the diagnostic, we’ll give you a detailed estimate before any work begins.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: That sounds good to me. Thank you for your help, Michael.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: You’re welcome, Alex! Is there anything else I can help you with today?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: No, that's all for now. I appreciate it!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, Alex. We look forward to seeing you on Saturday!
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: See you then!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Take care!
segments.speaker: local party
